title: centaurea karamanii
intro: Centaurea karamanii, also known as Karaman's knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Centaurea karamanii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat conditions such as wounds and infections. Centaurea karamanii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
